## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Attention and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, programmatic SEO opportunities, and conversion optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Programmatic SEO focus: Shift from blog-centric to multi-pronged approach (resource center, features, use cases) to drive conversions](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Conversion optimization: Need for inline CTAs, lead magnets, and better tracking of ICP traffic and lead quality](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [New product feature: Attention launching internal workflow builder, opening opportunities for use case-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Update

  - [40 new high-search-volume topics identified, following cluster structure](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Content pipeline set through end of next month](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Technical SEO audit feedback: Web vitals improved, but still room for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Blog page load times significantly improved](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)

### Programmatic SEO Opportunities

  - [Integration pages: Explore traction potential and specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Templates: Email scripts, industry/persona-based content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Resource center: e.g., "Top 100 sales chat GPT prompts"](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Feature-focused content: Leveraging Attention's product capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Use case combinations: Utilizing new internal workflow builder feature](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)

### Conversion Optimization

  - [Current blog content driving impressions but lacking conversions](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Need for inline CTAs, newsletter signups, and lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Implement lead scoring to identify high-quality traffic](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Track ICP traffic sources (blog vs. landing pages)](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Goal: 0.5-0.8% conversion rate for qualified ICP traffic](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Utilize existing tools (e.g., RB2B) for visitor identification](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Map form submissions to initial entry URLs](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Consider implementing more sophisticated tracking (webhooks, enrichment)](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Tie blog traffic to RB2B data for deeper insights](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)

### New Product Feature: Internal Workflow Builder

  - [Zapier-like functionality within Attention's product](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Enables creation of various use cases and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Opportunity for programmatic content around use case combinations](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to research and propose programmatic SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Attention to provide more context on new workflow builder feature](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [Explore implementation of conversion-focused elements on blog](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Investigate current analytics setup and potential improvements](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Consider Jimmy's offer to test and record Attention product usage](https://fathom.video/share/xytj6cMbw3jQ3G33PjAwCP7_9udNt_XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
